home.title: It starts at the core
home.subtitle1: We design and build digital products that
home.subtitle2: work. For users and for business.
home.horizonSubtext: Together, we move towards that point on the horizon.
home.intro1b: What does your business want to achieve?
home.intro2: We keep asking until both answers are
home.intro4: That's the core. That's where we start.
home.intro5: From there, we build outward — together.
home.featuredWorkTagline: Designed to make impact. Measured to prove it.
home.aboutText: We're a small design studio based in Rotterdam. We work as an extension of your team. No layers, no hand-offs, just close collaboration with the people shaping your product.
home.aboutApproach1Text: With a compact team, every client gets senior-level attention. No juniors learning on your project — you work directly with the people who design and build.
home.aboutApproach2Text: Our clients visit regularly and we visit them. We believe the best products emerge when designers and stakeholders work side by side.
home.aboutApproach3Text: Research informs every decision — whether it kicks off the project or validates it along the way. AI-powered workflows help us move faster without sacrificing craft.
home.aboutApproach4Text: From discovery to production-ready code — we handle the full trajectory. Or we work alongside your developers, collaborating directly in the codebase for a tighter, more seamless handoff.
home.whyRadialText: Many ways to build digital products. We built Radial around the one that works best.
home.whyCol2Pro3: Research, design & code — end to end
home.aiText: AI makes it easier than ever to build and ship. We use it to move fast — from working prototypes to production-ready code in a single pass, accelerating every step of the process.
home.aiText2: But shipping something that doesn't work is pointless. Knowing what to build, understanding users, and making the right calls — that stays deeply human. That's where we step in. AI amplifies our craft — it doesn't replace the thinking behind it.
home.aiPoint1Text: We lead the research and talk to users. AI helps us prepare, analyze, and uncover patterns.
home.aiPoint2Text: We set the direction and strategy. AI explores options. We iterate, refine, and make the calls.
home.aiPoint3Text: Working prototypes and production code — built in a fraction of the time, without cutting corners.
home.aiPoint4Text: We design for people — so the thinking behind it stays human. Strategy, direction, and judgment require empathy and context only people can bring.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about your next project. We'd love to hear what you're working on.

about.title: Radial, from the inside out
about.subtitle: We're a small, focused studio that believes great digital products start with people at the core.
about.storyIntro: We founded Radial with a clear conviction: building great digital products requires focus, craft, and genuine collaboration — not big teams or bloated processes.
about.storyText: Radial was born in Rotterdam in 2019. With backgrounds touching agencies, startups, and enterprises, our founders saw what each does well and where things fall short. That shaped the studio they wanted to build: one where senior people do the work, design and development go hand in hand, and every client gets the attention they deserve.
about.storyGrowth: We've grown deliberately since. We stay small on purpose. Every client works directly with the people who design, build, and ship. No hand-offs to juniors, no layers between you and the work.
about.storyPhilosophy: We invest our energy in the work — for clients like Heineken, Uber, and SPIE. We believe great work speaks for itself.
about.storyToday: Today, we work with startups validating their first product, scale-ups refining their experience, and enterprises that need to move faster than their internal teams allow. Whether it's a four-day design sprint or a six-month product build — we bring the same level of care.
about.vision1Text: Not with features, not with technology, not with business cases. With real people and their real problems. Everything else follows.
about.vision2Text: The best work happens when a small group of talented people is deeply invested in the outcome. We don't scale with headcount — we scale with focus.
about.vision3Title: AI is a tool, not a shortcut
about.vision3Text: We use AI to amplify our process — synthesizing research faster, exploring more directions, iterating at speed. But the thinking, the taste, the judgment? That's still human.
about.vision4Title: Design and code, side by side
about.vision4Text: We don't throw designs over a wall. We design and build in tandem, because the best interface decisions happen when you can feel the product in your hands.
about.vision5Text: Too many teams ship beautiful products without ever knowing if they worked. We start every project with clear goals and measure against them. Conversion rates, task completion, user satisfaction — we track what matters. Not because clients ask for it, but because we believe good design should prove itself.
about.approachIntro: Most studios follow a linear process. We work in short, focused cycles — accelerated with AI.
about.approachStep1Text: Talk to users, analyze data, map the problem space. AI helps us prepare and uncover patterns faster.
about.approachStep2Text: From explorations to polished interfaces — fast. AI expands our options, we make the calls.
about.approachStep3Text: Production-ready code, integrated with your stack. AI accelerates development without cutting corners.
about.approachStep4Text: Test with real users, measure what matters, refine. Then start the next cycle.
about.teamIntro: Small team, big output. Everyone at Radial is senior, hands-on, and genuinely invested in the work.
about.teamBartBio: Sharp eye for detail, deep in the game. From scrappy startups to large corporates — Bart sees exactly what's holding a product back, pushes it forward with precision, and always knows what it takes to turn good into outstanding.
about.teamJasperBio: Dives deep into client domains and makes them his own — fast. Jasper gets what users need and what moves a business forward, then translates that into super user-friendly products that actually make an impact.
about.teamElwinBio: Turns tangled user paths into flows that just make sense. Elwin spots what's broken fast, explores dozens of creative directions, and always lands on the solution that's best for users — building towards a product experience that feels effortless.
about.smallByDesignText: We stay small on purpose. No social media, no content marketing, no sales team. Every hour we don't spend on self-promotion is an hour we spend on your product. We believe great work speaks for itself — and that's the only marketing we need.
about.ctaText: We'd love to hear about your project. Whether you have a clear brief or just an idea — let's explore what's possible.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Pick the package that fits your needs.
pricing.faq1Q: How does the design process work?
pricing.faq1A: We start with a kickoff to understand your goals, users, and constraints. From there we move into research, wireframing, visual design, and prototyping — always with regular check-ins so you stay in the loop.
pricing.faq2Q: How long does a typical project take?
pricing.faq2A: Most projects take between 4 and 12 weeks, depending on the scope. A design sprint delivers results in just four days. We'll give you a clear timeline before we start.
pricing.faq3Q: Do you also build the product?
pricing.faq3A: We focus on design and prototyping, but we work closely with development teams to ensure a smooth handoff. We can also recommend trusted development partners if needed.
pricing.faq4Q: What if I need changes after the project?
pricing.faq4A: We offer flexible support packages for ongoing iterations. Many clients continue with a monthly retainer for continuous improvements and new features.
pricing.faq5Q: Can I book a single day?
pricing.faq5A: Absolutely. Our day-rate packages are designed to be flexible. You can book a single day for a workshop, audit, or quick design task.
pricing.faq6A: We primarily work in Figma for design, FigJam for workshops, and Notion for documentation. Prototypes are built in Figma or code, depending on the project needs.
